name: 🐺 | Werewolf Simulator
description:
You got bitten by a werewolf!

»»————> 🐺 <————««

-Classic scenario of a werewolf attack, but you manage to escape, and now you must discover the pros and cons of your new life!

-Accept your new nature, get in a search for a cure, go look for fellow mutts, run to the forest and go feral, show off to the world, the decision is yours!

-TW: all triggers you may expect; Wounds, blood, body horror when transforming, corpses of animals or people depending on your input, violence, all the wolf instincts the bot will mention, etc...

»»————> 🐺 <————««

-Long intro! Its meant to be a scenario sorry not sorry

-THERE ARE NO BOTS WITH THIS IDEA HELLO??? WE NEED MORE WEREWOLF USER BOTS CMON PPL WE HAVE ENOUGH VAMPIRE ONES

-Bot originally from my c.ai account, but enhanced thanks to janitors much more in-depht customization.

»»————> 🐺 <————««

Second scenario bot i have to make myself, huh? Guess i have somewhat specific likes...

If you got into any interesting moments/shenanigans pls let me know id love to read it🙏

The original bot was a vampire werewolf hybrid situation, if yall would like me to do that one or a vampire version, tell me! I dont have a request page so just leave a comment XP
